channel.title: +Hunnic on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Hunnic on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Tungustic
item.description: 1280px-Linguistic map of the Tungusic languages Jurchen (proto-Manchu), Jin “The Han of the Song with aid from coethnic Hans within the Khitan empire made an alliance with the Khitan vassals, the Jurchen from Manchuria belonging to the Tungoosid branch of the Altaic peoples. The latter in 1124 CE defeated the Khitan and usurped all of their possessions in China, Manchuria and northern Korea.” {MT} “The Jurchen were initially allied to the Khitan and formed part of their their invasionary force during the conquest of the Koreans.
